name: Family Tree — Members' Practice
description: A medical-cannabis members' practice template. Heritage members'-club register — embossed crest, evergreen and brass, member-named strains, founder journals, patient artist takeovers. For practices that want patients to feel like kin, not customers. Lisbon-set, INFARMED-aligned, easily re-geographied.
features: Members-club visual register — embossed Marcellus crest, evergreen + brass + bone, no medical-green clichés
DropsShowcase tabs — member-named strains, each with a member story and a release date
Patient-artist quarterly takeover gallery — community feels lived-in, not stock
Founder & clinician journals (BlogFeatured) — long-form, monthly, member-bylined
Embossed membership-card crest in HeroSplit — wax-seal energy without the cliché
Marcellus display + DM Sans body + Petit Formal Script accent — engraved-roman type system
Dark evergreen anchors (Practice + Newsletter + Footer) on bone body — calm light/dark rhythm
WCAG 2.2 AA contrast pairs verified · prefers-reduced-motion honoured · focus-visible brass ring
author: BudStacks Platform
